texts.label: text
texts.orig: The Pythagorean theorem can be written as an equation relating the lengths of the sides *a* , *b* and the hypotenuse *c* .
texts.text: The Pythagorean theorem can be written as an equation relating the lengths of the sides *a* , *b* and the hypotenuse *c* .

texts.label: text
texts.orig: To use Docling, simply install `docling` from your package manager, e.g. pip: `pip install docling`
texts.text: To use Docling, simply install `docling` from your package manager, e.g. pip: `pip install docling`

texts.label: text
texts.orig: To convert individual documents with python, use `convert()` , for example:
texts.text: To convert individual documents with python, use `convert()` , for example:

texts.label: code
texts.orig:
from docling.document_converter import DocumentConverter

source = "https://arxiv.org/pdf/2408.09869"
converter = DocumentConverter()
result = converter.convert(source)
print(result.document.export_to_markdown())
texts.text:
from docling.document_converter import DocumentConverter

source = "https://arxiv.org/pdf/2408.09869"
converter = DocumentConverter()
result = converter.convert(source)
print(result.document.export_to_markdown())

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The program will output: `## Docling Technical Report[...]`
texts.text: The program will output: `## Docling Technical Report[...]`

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Alternatively, models can be programmatically downloaded using `docling.utils.model_downloader.download_models()` .
texts.text: Alternatively, models can be programmatically downloaded using `docling.utils.model_downloader.download_models()` .

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Also, you can use download-hf-repo parameter to download arbitrary models from HuggingFace by specifying repo id: `$ docling-tools models download-hf-repo ds4sd/SmolDocling-256M-preview Downloading ds4sd/SmolDocling-256M-preview model from HuggingFace...`
texts.text: Also, you can use download-hf-repo parameter to download arbitrary models from HuggingFace by specifying repo id: `$ docling-tools models download-hf-repo ds4sd/SmolDocling-256M-preview Downloading ds4sd/SmolDocling-256M-preview model from HuggingFace...`
